verses.text: Bezalel in singkha sing tawh singkuang bawl a, a dung pi thum leh letmat kua, a vai pi nih leh letmat thum, a san'na pi nih leh letmat thum mah ahi hi
Kham citak tawh a sung leh a pua zutin, a kimkotah kham geihual khat a bawl hi
A kiu lite-a' dingin kham kual li, a pang khatah kual nih, a pang langkhat-a' dingin kual nih mah a sung hi
Singkha singzawlte zong bawl a, kham tawh tuate zutin
singkuang puakna dingin singkuang panga kualte sungah a zawlte a khum hi
Kham citak tawh hehpihna tokhom khat bawl a, a dung pi thum leh letmat kua, a vai pi nih leh letmat thum ahi hi
Amah in sek tawh a kiseek kham tawh kherub nih, hehpihna tokhom mong tuakah a bawl hi
Kherub khat mong khatah, kherub khat a mong langkhatah om a, a mong nihte-ah hehpihna tokhom tawh sakhatin kherub-te a bawl hi
Kherub-te in a khate uh tua tokhom tungah zalin, amau' khate tawh hehpihna tokhom liimsun uh a, amaute khatlekhat kimaingat uh hi. Hehpihna tokhom lamah kherub-te' mai a nga hi.
Amah in singkha sing tawh sabuai zong bawl a, a dung pi thum, a vai pi khat leh alang, a san'na pi nih leh letmat thum ahi hi
Kham citak tawh zut a, a kimkotah kham tawh a geihual khat a bawl hi
Khut peek cia a pha zawl khat a kimkotah bawl a, a zawl kimkotah kham geihual khat a bawl hi
Tua sabuai-a' dingin kham kual li sungin, a kiu li, a khe lite-ah a kualte a gak hi
Sabuai puakna ding zawlte a len dingin a zawl gei-ah a kualte om hi
Sabuai puakna dingin singkha singzawlte bawl a, kham tawh tuate a zut hi
Amah in sabuai tunga om ding beellekuangte, paknamtui-a' dingin kuangdaite leh pakante, tui buahna dingin kuang-ukte leh thawl gongbakte, kham citak tawh a bawl hi.
Amah in kham citak tawh meivakkhuam zong a bawl hi. Meivakkhuam a bul leh a kungte pen a kiseek nate tawh kibawl hi. A haite, a nunte, leh a pakte, meivakkhuam tawh sakhat ahi hi
A pangte panin hiang guk meeng khia a, a pang khatah meivakkhuam hiang thum omin, a pang langkhatah meivakkhuam hiang thum mah a om hi

Hiang khat tungah a nun leh a pak a om, almond gah tawh a kibang hai thum, leh adang hiang khat ciat tungah a nun leh a pak a om, almond gah tawh a kibang hai thum mah kibawl hi. Tua ahih ciangin meivakkhuam panin a hiang gukte a meeng khia ahi hi
A meivakkhuam tung mahmahah a nun leh a pak tawh a om, almond gah bangin a kibawl hai li omin
meivakkhuam panin hiang guk a kopte' bulah tua tawh sakhat ahi nun khat om hi
Amau' nunte leh a hiangte pen tua tawh sakhat hi a, a buppi-in kham citak a kiseek sakhat ahi hi
A meivak sagihte leh a taitehte leh a kuangte kham citak a bawl ahi hi
Amah in kham citak tawi sawmnih leh tawi khat a gik tawh tua meivakkhuam leh a nazatte khempeuh a bawl hi.

Amah in singkha sing tawh paknamtui biakna tau bawl a, a dung pi khat leh alang, a vai pi khat leh alang mah ahi hi. Tua pen a ning kikim a, a san'na pi thum hi a, a kite pen tua biakna tau tawh sakhat ahi hi
Amah in a tungzang, a kimkota a pangte leh a kite kham citak tawh a zut hi. A kimkotah kham geihual khat
leh a puakna ding zawlte a len dingin a pang tuak a geihual nuai takah kham kual nih a bawl hi
Amah in singkha sing tawh a zawlte bawlin, kham tawh tuate a zut hi.
Amah in paknamtui bawlte' gawm bangin a siangtho nilh sathau leh a siangtho a namtui paknamtui zong a bawl hi.
